PreToolUse.bash: if command -v base >/dev/null 2>&1 && base '__hook' 'capabilities' '--require-feature' 'pre-tool' '--require' '>=0.2.0, <0.3.0' >/dev/null 2>&1; then base '__hook' 'pre-tool' '--target' 'copilot' '--default-branch' 'main' || printf '%s\n' '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}'; else printf '%s\n' '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}'; fi
PreToolUse.powershell: $b = Get-Command base -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($b) { & base '__hook' 'capabilities' '--require-feature' 'pre-tool' '--require' '>=0.2.0, <0.3.0' *> $null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { & base '__hook' 'pre-tool' '--target' 'copilot' '--default-branch' 'main'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}' } } else { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}' } } else { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}' }

PreToolUse.bash: if command -v base >/dev/null 2>&1 && base '__hook' 'capabilities' '--require-feature' 'pre-tool' '--require' '>=0.2.0, <0.3.0' >/dev/null 2>&1; then base '__hook' 'pre-tool' '--target' 'copilot' '--default-branch' 'main' || printf '%s\n' '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}'; else printf '%s\n' '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}'; fi
PreToolUse.powershell: $b = Get-Command base -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($b) { & base '__hook' 'capabilities' '--require-feature' 'pre-tool' '--require' '>=0.2.0, <0.3.0' *> $null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { & base '__hook' 'pre-tool' '--target' 'copilot' '--default-branch' 'main'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}' } } else { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}' } } else { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}' }

SessionStart.bash: if command -v base >/dev/null 2>&1 && base '__hook' 'capabilities' '--require-feature' 'policy' '--require' '>=0.2.0, <0.3.0' >/dev/null 2>&1; then base '__hook' 'policy' 'session-context' '--target' 'copilot' || true; fi
SessionStart.powershell: $b = Get-Command base -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($b) { & base '__hook' 'capabilities' '--require-feature' 'policy' '--require' '>=0.2.0, <0.3.0' *> $null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { & base '__hook' 'policy' 'session-context' '--target' 'copilot' } }; exit 0
